hero.title: Moving company to and from Finland – Stockholm, Helsinki and the whole country
hero.subtitle: We help Swedish families and businesses with moves to Finland and Finnish customers with moves to Sweden. Our routine with cross-border logistics, customs handling and coordination between Swedish and Finnish properties means the move goes smoothly despite distance and language barriers.

features.title: What benefits do you get with Flyttella for moves to/from Finland?

about.title: About Flyttella for moves to and from Finland
about.desktop: Flyttella has been operating for over 8 years and helped 8,000 customers with moves in the Stockholm area and internationally. For moves to and from Finland we have built solid experience handling cross-border logistics, customs forms and coordination between Swedish and Finnish properties. We're used to navigating different housing types – from apartments in central Helsinki to houses in Tampere and Turku – and we understand the differences in property structure and moving logistics between the countries.
about.desktop2: Our teams handle moves between Sweden and Finland with focus on punctuality, clear communication and careful handling of customs and transport documentation. We coordinate loading in Sweden, transport across the border and unloading in Finland – all with one dedicated coordinator who keeps the timeline together and ensures all documentation is correct. Packing, storage, cleaning and assembly are bundled in one solution tailored for international moves.
about.desktop3: Every move to/from Finland includes complimentary box loans, free rescheduling up to 24 hours before move day and a 14-day guarantee on cleaning services. Support can give concrete advice on customs forms, transport times across the border, parking in Finnish cities and how to navigate differences in property rules between Sweden and Finland.
about.mobile: Experienced teams for moves to/from Finland with fixed pricing and structured logistics.
about.mobileExpanded: We handle customs forms, coordinate transport across the border and plan loading and unloading in both countries.
about.mobileExpanded2: One point of contact follows you from quote to move-in with advice on customs, transport times and logistics in both Sweden and Finland.

experienceSection.title: Our experience with moves to and from Finland

experience.title: Our experience with moves to and from Finland
experience.description: We regularly move between Sweden and Finland – from apartments in Stockholm to houses in Helsinki, from Swedish villas to Finnish row houses in Tampere and Turku. Our routine with cross-border logistics, customs handling and coordination between different property structures means we can adapt each move to distance, transport times and local conditions in both countries.
experience.expanded: For larger projects we do site visits in both Sweden and Finland to assess carry routes, elevator status and parking situation. Experience from moves between Swedish and Finnish properties – from modern apartment buildings in central Helsinki to older villas in Tampere – means we know exactly how much time is needed for transport across the border, customs handling and differences in property structure between the countries.

reviews.subtitle: Most recommended mover for moves to/from Finland
reviews.description: Reviews from customers who moved to/from Finland highlight our punctual handling of cross-border logistics, clear communication about customs forms and transport times, and careful coordination between Swedish and Finnish properties. Clients particularly value that we understand the differences in property structure and moving logistics between the countries and can give practical advice on parking, elevator bookings and local rules in both Sweden and Finland.

awards.title: Flyttella awards for moves to and from Finland
awards.description: Our awards reflect our long experience with cross-border moves between Sweden and Finland. Clients value our ability to handle customs forms efficiently, coordinate transport across the border punctually and navigate differences in property structure and moving logistics between the countries. These awards confirm that we deliver consistent quality whether the move goes to Helsinki, Tampere, Turku or other Finnish cities.

servicesSection.title: Discover all our services for moves to/from Finland
servicesSection.description: Household moves between Sweden and Finland, packing, storage, cleaning, assembly and advisory services for international moves. We handle customs forms, transport across the border, parking and logistics in both Swedish and Finnish cities.

blogSection.title: Guides and tips for moving to/from Finland
blogSection.description: Prepare customs forms in advance, label boxes by room, coordinate transport times across the border and plan extra time for customs handling and differences in property structure between the countries.

blog.title: Checklist: moving to/from Finland
blog.description: Verify customs forms, transport times across the border, parking permits in both countries and check differences in property rules and elevator bookings before move day.

processSection.title: Our process
processSection.subtitle: How it works
processSection.description: Our moving process is simple, transparent and safe: fill out the form, get a quote within a minute, get personal follow-up the same day and sign digitally when everything feels right. The quote is based on your actual conditions – distance, transport across the border, customs handling, living area, floors, elevator, parking distance – and can be supplemented with packing, cleaning or storage without hidden fees.

process.fillFormDesc: Describe addresses in Sweden and Finland, date, floors, elevator rules, parking and if basement/attic should be emptied. Specify desired additional services and customs handling.
process.quickQuoteDesc: You get a fixed quote with clear scope including transport across the border and customs handling. If inspection is needed in both countries we book it before finalizing the price.
process.signConfirmDesc: After signing we book transport across the border, arrange customs forms, secure parking permits in both countries and send route plan with contact details.
process.personalContactDesc: Your coordinator keeps you updated on transport times, customs handling and tips on packing. We ensure protection and boxes are delivered on time.
process.moveCompletedDesc: The team protects entrances, builds carry chains via stairs or elevator and loads sequentially for transport across the border and quick unloading in Finland.
process.satisfiedCustomerDesc: We do a joint walkthrough, adjust furniture placement and ensure cleaning or storage matches the plan in both Sweden and Finland.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about moving to/from Finland

items.question: How do you handle customs forms and transport across the border?
items.answer: We help with all customs forms, coordinate transport across the border and ensure all documentation is correct. We have experience handling differences in property structure and moving logistics between Sweden and Finland.

items.question: Can you help with packing an entire home?
items.answer: Yes, our packing teams label boxes by room, protect kitchenware and closets and can also pack storage or hobby rooms. We adapt packing to transport across the border and customs handling.

items.question: What's included in your moving service to/from Finland?
items.answer: We handle everything from packing and transport across the border to unpacking and cleaning. All prices are fixed without hidden fees, and we offer complimentary box loans and free rescheduling up to 24 hours before.

items.question: Do you offer storage if move-in is delayed?
items.answer: Absolutely, we store in alarmed, dry warehouses in both Sweden and Finland and deliver back when the new home is ready.

items.question: How far in advance should I book a move to/from Finland?
items.answer: For international moves we recommend 4–6 weeks in advance to ensure transport across the border and customs handling. We always try to solve quick requests when possible.
